thesis: Teqnion AB is a Swedish decentralized serial acquirer of niche industrial subsidiaries. **[Fact]** FY2025 net sales were **1,800.0 MSEK** (+15%); EBITA **203.1 MSEK** (+36%) at an **11.3%** margin; organic net sales **−5%** after deliberate exits. **[Fact]** FCF ex-acquisitions was **173.1 MSEK** (operating CF **184.6** minus non-acquisition investing **11.5**); **17,165,756** shares; board proposed **no dividend** (`TEQ.ST/official-reports/annual-reports/2026-03-21 - Årsredovisning 2025.pdf`).
why_market_wrong: Headline organic **−5%** may anchor sentiment while margin and cash-flow inflection are under-discounted. **[Inference]** FY2025 EBITA margin rose from **9.6%** to **11.3%** and Q1 2026 EBITA margin hit **14.3%** (prior interim), suggesting pruning is working. There is no dated HK payoff; mispricing, if any, is franchise quality at a full multiple.

key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share

key_assumptions.source: Proof-first component schedule (core + reinvestment + net financial − reserve)

open_questions: Q1 2026 interim remains inventory tier — re-extract for filing-grounded quarterly metrics.
Goodwill impairment 73 MSEK and earnout revaluations flag past overpayment risk.
Antheia/Vixar block trade context — not in base IRR.
